reviews.author: Shalini Reddy
reviews.review_body: The principal of this school is very rude and she's such a big mannerless person.. She doesn't know how to talk with parents and elders.. She talks to parents as if they are her students and she has too much of attitude.. If she continues like this I'm sure that the school will close one day. She doesn't even deserve the post of a sweeper.. The management of this school must open their eyes..

reviews.school_name: BRAHMAM TALENT HIGH SCHOOL - Madhura Nagar

reviews.author: Chandra Sethu
reviews.review_body: There was no respect for me and no discipline maintained by the Principal herself. She was even rude when she talked with me. I am not sure as to what kind of discipline and manners the students would learn from the seniors or teachers. Very bad and sad experience.....
